bluefruit52_init.message0: Initialize Bluefruit peripheral links %1 central links %2
bluefruit52_init.tooltip: Initialize the Bluefruit BLE stack and set peripheral/central connection counts

bluefruit52_set_name.tooltip: Set the BLE device name used by advertising and GATT

bluefruit52_auto_conn_led.tooltip: Enable or disable the Bluefruit connection status LED

bluefruit52_config_bandwidth.tooltip: Configure the bandwidth profile for the peripheral or central role

bluefruit52_connected.tooltip: Return whether any BLE connection exists

bluefruit52_disconnect.tooltip: Disconnect a BLE connection by connection handle

bluefruit52_callback_conn_handle.tooltip: Read the current connection handle inside BLE callbacks

bluefruit52_callback_disconnect_reason.tooltip: Read the disconnect reason code inside disconnect callbacks

bluefruit52_callback_data.tooltip: Read text cached by BLE UART or characteristic write callbacks

bluefruit52_adv_clear.tooltip: Clear advertising packet data or scan-response data

bluefruit52_adv_add_flags.tooltip: Add LE Only General Discoverable flags to the advertising packet

bluefruit52_adv_add_tx_power.tooltip: Add the TX Power field to the advertising packet

bluefruit52_adv_add_name.tooltip: Add the device name to advertising or scan response data

bluefruit52_adv_add_service.tooltip: Add an existing BLE service UUID to the advertising packet

bluefruit52_adv_add_uuid.tooltip: Add a service UUID to the advertising packet from a UUID string

bluefruit52_adv_add_appearance.tooltip: Add a BLE appearance value to the advertising packet

bluefruit52_adv_restart_on_disconnect.tooltip: Set whether advertising restarts automatically after disconnection

bluefruit52_adv_set_interval.tooltip: Set fast and slow advertising intervals in 0.625 ms units

bluefruit52_adv_set_initial_timeout.tooltip: Set the duration of fast advertising in seconds

bluefruit52_adv_stop.tooltip: Stop the current BLE advertising activity

bluefruit52_adv_is_running.tooltip: Return whether advertising is currently running

bluefruit52_bleuart_create.tooltip: Create a Nordic UART Service peripheral object

bluefruit52_bleuart_write.tooltip: Send text or data through BLE UART

bluefruit52_bleuart_available.tooltip: Return the number of bytes in the BLE UART receive buffer

bluefruit52_bleuart_read.tooltip: Read one byte from BLE UART; returns -1 on failure

bluefruit52_bleuart_read_string.tooltip: Read all text from the BLE UART buffer

bluefruit52_bleuart_notify_enabled.tooltip: Check whether the central has enabled BLE UART notifications

bluefruit52_bleuart_on_receive.message0: Set BLE UART %1 when data received
bluefruit52_bleuart_on_receive.tooltip: Register a BLE UART receive callback; callback data can be read by the current callback-data block

bluefruit52_bleuart_peripheral_quick.message0: Quick start BLE UART peripheral name %1
bluefruit52_bleuart_peripheral_quick.tooltip: Initialize Bluefruit, device information, BLE UART, and standard advertising in one block

bluefruit52_bleuart_quick_send.tooltip: Send data through the BLE UART object created by quick mode

bluefruit52_bleuart_quick_received_data.tooltip: Read all text from the quick-mode BLE UART receive buffer

bluefruit52_bleuart_quick_connected.tooltip: Check whether quick-mode BLE UART is connected

bluefruit52_service_create.tooltip: Create a custom GATT service object

bluefruit52_service_begin.tooltip: Register and start a GATT service

bluefruit52_characteristic_create.message0: Create BLE characteristic %1 UUID %2 properties %3 max length %4
bluefruit52_characteristic_create.tooltip: Create a custom GATT characteristic object and configure properties and maximum length

bluefruit52_characteristic_begin.tooltip: Add the characteristic to the most recently started GATT service

bluefruit52_characteristic_write_text.tooltip: Write a local text value to the characteristic

bluefruit52_characteristic_notify_text.tooltip: Send a text notification to subscribed centrals

bluefruit52_characteristic_indicate_text.tooltip: Send a confirmed text indication to subscribed centrals

bluefruit52_characteristic_read_string.tooltip: Read the current characteristic value and convert it to text

bluefruit52_characteristic_notify_enable.tooltip: Check whether notifications are enabled for this characteristic

bluefruit52_characteristic_on_write.tooltip: Register the characteristic write callback; place before starting the characteristic

bluefruit52_dis_create.tooltip: Create a BLE Device Information Service object

bluefruit52_dis_set.tooltip: Set a Device Information Service field

bluefruit52_dis_begin.tooltip: Start the BLE Device Information Service

bluefruit52_bas_create.tooltip: Create a BLE Battery Service object

bluefruit52_scanner_config.message0: Configure scan interval %1 window %2 active scan %3 restart on disconnect %4
bluefruit52_scanner_config.tooltip: Configure central scan parameters in 0.625 ms units

bluefruit52_scanner_resume.tooltip: Resume scanning inside the scan callback

bluefruit52_scanner_filter_uuid.tooltip: Only scan devices that contain the specified UUID

bluefruit52_on_scan_report.tooltip: Register a scan callback; RSSI, address, and UUID match results can be read inside the callback

bluefruit52_scan_report_rssi.tooltip: Read the RSSI of the current scan report

bluefruit52_scan_report_address.tooltip: Read the MAC address of the current scan report

bluefruit52_scan_report_has_uuid.tooltip: Check whether the current scan report contains the specified service UUID

bluefruit52_central_connect_report.tooltip: Connect the central role to the device from the current scan callback

bluefruit52_central_connected.tooltip: Check whether the central role is connected

bluefruit52_client_uart_create.tooltip: Create a BLE UART central client object

bluefruit52_client_uart_discover.message0: Central BLE UART %1 discover service connection handle %2
bluefruit52_client_uart_discover.tooltip: Discover remote Nordic UART Service after connecting

bluefruit52_client_uart_enable_txd.message0: Central BLE UART %1 enable receive notification
bluefruit52_client_uart_enable_txd.tooltip: Enable remote TXD notifications to receive data

bluefruit52_client_uart_write.tooltip: Send data to a connected BLE UART peripheral

bluefruit52_client_uart_read_string.message0: Central BLE UART %1 read all text
bluefruit52_client_uart_read_string.tooltip: Read all text received by the BLE UART client

bluefruit52_client_uart_on_receive.message0: Set central BLE UART %1 when data received
bluefruit52_client_uart_on_receive.tooltip: Set the BLE UART client receive callback

bluefruit52_hid_create.tooltip: Create a BLE HID keyboard/mouse service object

bluefruit52_hid_key_sequence.tooltip: Send keyboard input as a character sequence

bluefruit52_hid_mouse_move.message0: BLE HID %1 mouse move X %2 Y %3
bluefruit52_hid_mouse_move.tooltip: Send a relative mouse movement report

bluefruit52_beacon_create.message0: Create iBeacon %1 UUID %2 major %3 minor %4 RSSI %5
bluefruit52_beacon_create.tooltip: Create and configure an iBeacon object

bluefruit52_eddystone_create.tooltip: Create and configure an Eddystone URL beacon object

bluefruit52_adv_set_beacon.tooltip: Write an iBeacon or Eddystone object into the advertising packet
